The Flight Centre Travel & Tours

Pakistan's IATA certified travel and tours agency

Identity

Legal Name: The Flight Centre Travel & Tours
Urdu Name: دی فلائٹ سینٹر ٹریول اینڈ ٹورز
Type: IATA Certified Travel Agency
CEO: Rana Khalid Parvez Khan
Founded: Serving clients for more than 20 years
Main Office: Office 36-37, Jinnah Stadium, Gujranwala, Punjab, Pakistan
Branch Office: Plaza 18, Neelum Block DC Colony, Gujranwala, Punjab, Pakistan

Credentials

Credential: IATA Certified Travel Agency
Coverage: Flights, Umrah packages, tours, hotels, visit visas, travel insurance

Services

Flight Booking - all major international and domestic airlines
Umrah Packages - complete 15, 21 and 28 day packages
International Tour Packages - curated packages from Pakistan
Worldwide Hotel Booking - global hotel reservations
Visit Visa Services - tourist and family visit visas for all countries
Travel Insurance - international travel and medical insurance
B2B Agent Portal - same-day activation for travel agencies
